text:
technically referred to as the initial coverage limit 
(ICL) for the Part D benefit. Plans that use a co-payment amount rather than a coinsurance percentage 
will not have a value in this field; reference instead the corresponding co-payment variable called 
(GAP_INPP_COPAY_2M). 

Starting in 2016, CMS changed how they describe pharmacy networks. The INPP are currently referred 
to as preferred pharmacies within split networks. There is no change in the meaning of the variable, 
and the data
